questionHtml: Calculate the value of the cross-sectional area to two decimal places.
markschemeHtml:
213.33 (cm2)         A2

 

Note: Answer must be given to 2 decimal places to award A2. Award A1A0 for a correct answer given to an incorrect accuracy of at least 3 significant figures, e.g. 213 (cm2).

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the value of the cross-sectional area to two decimal places.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 5.5—Integration introduction, areas between curve and x axis
